subcategory: Animated hero section with gradient SVG line drawing effects
use_cases: Landing page hero section with animated decorative elements
Full-screen introduction with dynamic gradient line animations
Visual break section with continuous SVG path drawing effects
Dark-themed landing pages requiring animated visual elements
SaaS product hero sections with premium animated aesthetics
ai_summary: A dark-themed hero section component featuring animated SVG paths that draw themselves on load using the getTotalLength() method. The component renders corner decorations with gradient lines against a near-black background (#0a0a0a), creating a sophisticated animated visual effect ideal for SaaS, fintech, and developer tool landing pages. The animations are CSS-based and continuous rather than scroll-triggered.
